findings.summary: Temperature/top_p input validation uses Number.parseFloat with clamping and Number.isNaN guard — no crash path found for invalid numeric input
Number.parseFloat is locale-INsensitive — comma input silently corrupted to 0, no locale bug in path
saveCustomAgents uses optimistic update with prev capture and rollback — but race exists if two rapid saves and first IPC fails late
Delete uses filtered re-save pattern (no dedicated delete IPC handler). handleConfirmDelete is async after recent fix commit 9e953e7be
Empty state is safe — List component handles empty array with 'No agents found' message, default initial state is []
Server-side validateAndFilterAgents only checks id/name/prompt as strings — does not validate temperature/top_p types, allowing corrupted data to persist
api() accessor has unchecked type cast and only exposes getCustomAgents/setCustomAgents — no delete-dedicated method, no error handling on initial load
handleSave has NO try/catch — uncaught errors from crypto.randomUUID(), .toString() on corrupted data, or props.onSave() propagate as renderer crashes
